productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Sequin Gold Wallet
description: Add bling to your outfit with this simply stylish wallet from lino perros. The heavy sequin work on the upper and loads of organiser space on the inner makes this wallet a great buy. Three-fold wallet made of synthetic leather with heavy sequin work on the upper Main flap has a clasp button flap closure, with card slots and two organiser pouches on the inside Middle portion has card slots, a transparent pouch and two organiser pouches Third flap has one main compartment and four organiser pouches on the inside, and an outer pouch with a clasp button closure Care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust
